title: Echoes of the Leviathan
tone: Tense sci-fi survival horror with a claustrophobic atmosphere and an intense focus on resource management, isolation, and psychological distress.
main_character: {"name": "Elara", "age": 34, "personality_traits": ["Resourceful and adaptable in zero-G environments", "Plagued by claustrophobia and a fear of the dark", "Highly skilled with tools but struggles with panic attacks"]}
lore_and_rules: {"key_facts_about_the_world": ["The Leviathan is an enormous deep-space mining vessel, 2.5 km long and filled with narrow corridors", "It has been adrift in silence for three months, the crew either dead or missing"], "technology_in_the_game": {"power_management": "Most areas are pitch-black; players must manage battery life on equipment", "zero-gravity_movement": "Elara can push off walls and use tethers to navigate", "oxygen_tanks_and_battery_power": "Elara's oxygen levels and flashlight batteries will deplete over time"}}

plot_outline.title: Awakening
plot_outline.setting: The pitch-black cryo-bay of the Leviathan
plot_outline.goal: Find a plasma cutter and restore auxiliary power to access ship schematics
obstacles: Strange, skittering sounds coming from the vents and ductwork above
Depleting oxygen levels in her suit as she navigates by touch

plot_outline.title: The Hydroponics Lab
plot_outline.setting: A flooded zero-G hydroponics bay filled with mutated plants and debris
plot_outline.goal: Find the Captain's override keycard to gain access to restricted areas of the ship
obstacles: The oxygen levels in her suit are dangerously low, and she must find a replacement tank quickly
The plants have grown monstrously large, their thorny vines capable of slashing at her if too close

plot_outline.title: Escape and Confrontation
plot_outline.setting: The escape pod bay, with the ship's self-destruct sequence ticking down around her
plot_outline.goal: Initiate the ship's self-destruct to destroy any remaining alien threats and escape on an escape pod
obstacles: A final confrontation with a massive alien hunter that has been stalking her through the ship
She must choose between attempting to fight or evade the creature while navigating to the pods

author: Anonymous
